args.Description: "Change marketing campaign card titles to font-semibold for a less prominent, cleaner look."
args.Instruction: "Change font-bold to font-semibold in the marketing card h3 title."
args.ReplacementContent: "                                                                 <h3 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 leading-snug group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors\">"
args.TargetContent: "                                                                 <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-slate-900 leading-snug group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors\">"
